published_prior_art.cite: BorusyakJaravelSpiess2024: efficient imputation benchmark and precision comparisons, but not the exact four-estimator quotient IF identity

repo_prior_art.cite: panel_honest_did_phase: cohort-vs-aggregate sensitivity frontier; q1_spectral_phase_transition: event-window row-space visibility, neither duplicates four-estimator IF frontier

published_prior_art.cite: ChenSantAnnaXie2025 gives closed-form EIFs for DiD/ES parameters; BorusyakJaravelSpiess2024 gives BJS efficiency and restricted equivalences; neither states the necessary-and-sufficient BJS/SA/CS/Wooldridge quotient row-space IF frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: Q1_MinimalBasis/Q1_StaggeredMinimalBasis homogeneous clean-basis corners are adjacent but not this Gamma_m normalization

published_prior_art.cite: SunAbraham2021, CallawaySantAnna2021, Wooldridge2021: homogeneous-effect equivalence is standard; the role here is only a sanity reduction for the proposed Gamma_m operator

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The setup says Gamma_m is formed after whitening residual coordinates by Sigma^{+/2}, but the IF loading and variance formulas then use (Gamma_m tau)^T Sigma^+ R_i and ||Gamma_m tau||_{Sigma^{-1}}^2; choose either raw loadings with Sigma^+ or whitened loadings with Euclidean norm.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Fix the Gamma_m scaling convention explicitly: define a raw loading L_m with scalar L_m tau^T Sigma^+ R_i, or define a whitened loading G_m=Sigma^{+/2}L_m with scalar G_m tau^T Sigma^{+/2}R_i and Euclidean variance norm.
Add a one-line comparison table for BJS, SA, CS, and Wooldridge listing the exact published estimator object and the comparison-set incidence matrix B_m that Stage 0 will residualize.
State a minimal three-period, two-cohort worked algebraic sub-claim as a proposition or example so the quotient frontier is visibly nonempty and not only an abstract operator recipe.

recommended_next_step: Patch the Gamma_m whitening/raw-loading convention, then resend; the novelty kernel itself clears both repo and published axes at flagship tier.
